documentation: Audio stream ended before wake word was detected.

classes.name: wyoming.satellite.RunSatellite

documentation: Informs the satellite that the server is not ready to run a pipeline.

documentation: Satellite has started streaming audio to server.

documentation: Satellite has stopped streaming audio to server.

classes.name: wyoming.server.AsyncEventHandler

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncEventHandler.handle_event
documentation: Handle an event. Returning false will disconnect the client.

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncEventHandler.write_event
documentation: Send an event to the client.

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncEventHandler.run
documentation: Receive events until stopped or handle_event returns false.

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncEventHandler.stop
documentation: Try to stop the event handler.
Base class for async Wyoming event handler.

classes.name: wyoming.server.AsyncServer

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncServer.run
documentation: Start server and block while running.

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncServer.stop
documentation: Try to stop all event handlers.
Base class for async Wyoming server.

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncStdioServer.run
documentation: Start server and block while running.

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncTcpServer.stop
documentation: Try to stop all event handlers.

methods.name: wyoming.server.AsyncUnixServer.stop

modules.name: wyoming.pyaudioop
documentation:
Partial implementation of the deprecated audioop module.

Only supports:
  - widths 1, 2, and 4
  - signed samples
  - tomono, tostereo, lin2lin, ratecv
